title: Browse
description: Explore your library, discover books, and manage your collection.

my-books.title: My Books
my-books.description: View and manage the books in your library.

books.description: Browse all books in the Libreads catalog.

tags.description: Manage your personal tags and browse tagged books.
tags.delete-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
tags.name: Name
tags.duplicate: A tag with this name already exists.
tags.dialog-description: Update tag names to keep your books organized.
tags.none: No tags yet, type to create.
tags.book-not-in-library: Add this book to your library before tagging it.

entity-management.name: Name
entity-management.delete-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
entity-management.duplicate: An entity with this name already exists.

add-books.title: Add Books
add-books.description: Import books from Hardcover, scan, or add them manually.

scan.title: Scan
scan.description: Add a book by scanning the ISBN code on the back.

manual.title: Manual
manual.description: Add a book by creating it manually.

import-flow.title: Import from Hardcover
import-flow.description: Search Hardcover works and choose an edition to import.
import-flow.step-work: Step 1 of 3: Search for a work
import-flow.search-work-placeholder: Search works by title, author, ISBN, or series...
import-flow.search-edition-placeholder: Search editions by title, format, ISBN, or author...
import-flow.no-works: No works found for this query.
import-flow.no-editions: No editions found for this work.
import-flow.confirm-description: Review the imported metadata before saving to Libreads.
import-flow.import-invalid-isbn: Imported edition has invalid ISBN data.
import-flow.already-exists: This Hardcover edition is already in Libreads.
import-flow.edition-not-found: The selected edition could not be found.
import-flow.api-error: Hardcover request failed. Please try again.
import-flow.api-token-missing: Hardcover API token is not configured.

scan-flow.title: Scan ISBN
scan-flow.description: Use your camera to scan a book ISBN and import the matching edition.
scan-flow.camera-description: Aim your camera at the ISBN barcode on the back of the book.
scan-flow.camera-active: Camera is active. Hold the barcode inside the frame.
scan-flow.camera-not-supported: Camera scanning is not supported in this browser.
scan-flow.camera-permission-denied: Camera permission was denied. Allow camera access and try again.
scan-flow.camera-start-failed: Could not start the camera. Please try again.
scan-flow.camera-read-failed: Could not read barcode from camera stream.
scan-flow.invalid-isbn-scan: Scanned barcode is not a valid ISBN-10 or ISBN-13.
scan-flow.no-editions: No Hardcover editions found for this ISBN.
scan-flow.confirm-description: Review the imported metadata before saving to Libreads.
scan-flow.import-invalid-isbn: Imported edition has invalid ISBN data.
scan-flow.already-exists: This Hardcover edition is already in Libreads.
scan-flow.edition-not-found: The selected edition could not be found.
scan-flow.api-error: Hardcover request failed. Please try again.
scan-flow.api-token-missing: Hardcover API token is not configured.

empty.no-books: No books in your library yet.
empty.try-different: Try adjusting your search or filters.

detail.subtitle: Subtitle
detail.title: Title
detail.delete-book-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this book? This action cannot be undone.
detail.rate-book-description: Rate the book from 0.5 to 5 stars, half stars are allowed.
detail.all-editions-for-entry-description: There are multiple editions for this entry in the series.
detail.notes-placeholder: Add personal notes about this book...
detail.book-notes-description: Keep personal notes for this book.
detail.update-progress-description: Update your current progress for this book.
detail.delete-read-through-description: Are you sure you want to delete this read-through? This action cannot be undone.
detail.remove-data-warning: This will delete {tags, plural, one {# tag} other {# tags}} and your personal notes.
detail.duration-format-error: Duration must be in HH:MM:SS format.
detail.book-slug-exists: That slug is already in use.
detail.book-hardcover-id-exists: That Hardcover ID is already in use.
detail.book-isbn10-exists: That ISBN-10 is already in use.
detail.book-isbn13-exists: That ISBN-13 is already in use.
detail.cover-invalid-type: Invalid cover type. Please upload JPG, PNG, or WebP.
detail.cover-too-large: Cover file is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
detail.publisher-duplicate-name: This publisher already exists. Select it instead of creating a duplicate.
detail.authors-new-placeholder: Comma-separated names, e.g. Ursula K. Le Guin, Octavia Butler

detail.genres-new-duplicate: These genres already exist: {names}. Select existing genres instead.

detail.series-entry-choose-one: Choose either an existing series or a new series name.
detail.series-duplicate-entry: This series entry is duplicated in the form.
detail.series-position-error: Series position must be a non-negative number.
detail.remove-from-library-description: Are you sure you want to remove this book from your library? This will delete your status, progress, notes, rating, and tags.
